variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 16469 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 16469 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 16469 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Donaldson P608675 Air Filter, Primary Obround Powercore | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16469
variants.description: Why Choose Donaldson PowerCore® filters? Genuine PowerCore filters provide superior protection and performance. • Lower initial restriction protects engine performance and fuel economy. • Greater filter capacity means longer filter life, fewer filter changes and less money spent on maintenance. • PowerCore filters have been meeting original equipment manufacturer specifications for 20+ years. • Reliable, leak resistant Radial Seal™ technology keeps the filter in place – even under heavy vibration.

variants.title: Mann Filter C 32 340 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16469
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF4205 Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16469
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF4205 air filter meets or exceeds the customers’ technical specifications for air filtration systems including factors such as: media fiber size, shape, pore size, thickness, weave and mechanical strength.
